entities.name: Semantic deduplication
entities.context: Approach to identifying duplicates based on meaning and context rather than exact string matching

entities.name: Title normalization
entities.context: Treating underscores, dashes, and spaces as equivalent when comparing titles

entities.name: Manual review
entities.context: Fallback process for handling uncertain deduplication cases - flag rather than delete

entities.name: File metadata
entities.context: Can be read to verify duplicate status when needed

relationships.context: Both are techniques for identifying equivalent content despite surface differences
Manual review serves as fallback when semantic deduplication has uncertainty
Metadata can support verification during deduplication process
